expectations.text: Response includes a visual directory tree structure showing the full workspace layout
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-61: Full project tree with docs/, src/ (types/, db/, routes/, middleware/, services/, config/), tests/, migrations/, and config files.

expectations.text: Response includes a CLAUDE.md template with a routing table
expectations.evidence: Lines 67-103: CLAUDE.md template has Quick Reference, Architecture Overview (directory list), Development Workflow (numbered steps), and When Switching Sessions (numbered list). No routing TABLE mapping tasks to directories.

expectations.text: Response includes CONTEXT.md content for at least 2 individual stages
expectations.evidence: No CONTEXT.md files created. Response uses docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/API-SPEC.md, docs/DECISIONS.md but no stage-level context files with Inputs/Process/Outputs contracts.

expectations.text: Response mentions token budgets or context window efficiency
expectations.evidence: Response discusses 'context persistence' and being 'Claude-friendly' but never mentions tokens, token budgets, context window size, or efficiency metrics.

expectations.text: Response includes Layer 3 reference files (_config/ or references/) separate from working directories
expectations.evidence: No _config/ or references/ directories. Uses docs/ for documentation but these are project docs mixed with the codebase, not separated stable-reference material.

expectations.text: Response distinguishes between stable reference material and per-run working artifacts
expectations.evidence: No factory/product or stable/ephemeral distinction. All files treated as part of the same project structure without distinguishing reference material from working artifacts.
